title: Figura Pack Reorder
description: Reorders Figura's runtime resource pack so its higher priority than the mod. Mainly for use with custom backends.
body:
# Figura Pack Reorder
This mod is quite simple. All it does is move [Figura](https://modrinth.com/mod/figura)'s runtime resource pack to be above Figura itself in terms of priority. Made with intention for use with custom backends such as [Nuovo](https://nuovo.zoid.one/).

This allows for custom backends to change existing assets rather than only being able to add new ones. (e.g. repurposing badges)

Only versions that Figura supports are tagged, but the mod loads on every version I've tested >1.19.3, including through [Sinytra Connector](https://modrinth.com/mod/connector), so it should support future Figura versions.

This appears to have been intentional behaviour at one point, as it seems to work without this mod in versions <=1.19.3, but the offical backend doesn't use it and thus it has gone unpatched.
